query:
INSERT INTO orderItems (orderId, productId, productName, quantity, unitPrice, totalPrice, complements, notes) 
SELECT o.id, 1, 'X-Burguer Especial', 2, 22.95, 45.90, NULL, NULL FROM orders o WHERE o.orderNumber = '1001'
UNION ALL
SELECT o.id, 2, 'Batata Frita Grande', 1, 32.50, 32.50, NULL, NULL FROM orders o WHERE o.orderNumber = '1002'
UNION ALL
SELECT o.id, 1, 'X-Bacon', 3, 26.00, 78.00, NULL, 'Bem passado' FROM orders o WHERE o.orderNumber = '1003'
UNION ALL
SELECT o.id, 3, 'Pizza Margherita', 1, 55.00, 55.00, NULL, NULL FROM orders o WHERE o.orderNumber = '1004'
UNION ALL
SELECT o.id, 4, 'Refrigerante 2L', 2, 21.40, 42.80, NULL, NULL FROM orders o WHERE o.orderNumber = '1005'
UNION ALL
SELECT o.id, 5, 'Combo Família', 1, 89.90, 89.90, NULL, NULL FROM orders o WHERE o.orderNumber = '1006'
UNION ALL
SELECT o.id, 6, 'Açaí 500ml', 1, 35.50, 35.50, NULL, 'Com granola' FROM orders o WHERE o.orderNumber = '1007'
UNION ALL
SELECT o.id, 7, 'Rodízio Completo', 2, 60.00, 120.00, NULL, NULL FROM orders o WHERE o.orderNumber = '1008'
UNION ALL
SELECT o.id, 8, 'Sushi Combo 30 peças', 1, 67.30, 67.30, NULL, NULL FROM orders o WHERE o.orderNumber = '1009'
UNION ALL
SELECT o.id, 9, 'Marmitex G', 3, 15.00, 45.00, NULL, NULL FROM orders o WHERE o.orderNumber = '1010'
UNION ALL
SELECT o.id, 10, 'Pizza Calabresa', 1, 55.00, 55.00, NULL, NULL FROM orders o WHERE o.orderNumber = '1011'
UNION ALL
SELECT o.id, 11, 'Pastel de Carne', 2, 14.45, 28.90, NULL, NULL FROM orders o WHERE o.orderNumber = '1012';
